parameters.query:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (symbol) 
    symbol, price, timestamp
  FROM asset_prices
  ORDER BY symbol, timestamp DESC
),
prev AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (symbol)
    symbol, price
  FROM asset_prices
  WHERE timestamp <= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
  ORDER BY symbol, timestamp DESC
)
SELECT 
  l.symbol,
  l.price as current_price,
  p.price as prev_price,
  l.timestamp,
  CASE WHEN p.price > 0 
    THEN ((l.price - p.price) / p.price * 100)
    ELSE 0 
  END as change_pct
FROM latest l
LEFT JOIN prev p ON l.symbol = p.symbol
WHERE p.price IS NOT NULL
